calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2022 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing (Notices)
Off Calendar Sep-01-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Grigoriy Gevandian.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:13 a.m.

Roger Jackson, Esq. specially appeared for plaintiff San Francisco Federal Credit Union.
William Cooper, Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Messrs. Jackson and Cooper appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Grigoriy Gevandian.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Possession of Motor Vehicle, Breach of Secured Promissory Note and Money Due on Book Account filed January 25, 2022.
Substitute Service of plaintiff's Summons, Complaint and accompanying documents occurred on February 4, 2022, and was effectuated on February 17, 2022.
Default as to defendant Grigoriy Gevandian was entered on March 23, 2022.
DOE defendants dismissed on March 23, 2022.

Plaintiff San Francisco Federal Credit Union submits the following exhibits for the submit the following exhibit for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Membership & Account Application dated 11/30/2020..........................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Retail Installment Sales Contract dated 11/30/2020.........................ID/EVID
Exhibit 3: Safe Harbor Gap Addendum dated 11/30/2020..................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 4: Payment History dated 01/19/2022...........................................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff San Francisco Federal Credit Union, and against the defaulted defendant Grigoriy Gevandian, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $53.456.47.
Prejudgment Interest - $3,775.52.
Attorney Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $556.40.

Total - $60,613.39.

Additionally, plaintiff San Francisco Federal Credit Union is entitled to possession of the vehicle described as a 2016 BMW M4, VIN WBS3R9C55GK337477. Proceeds from the sale of said vehicle shall be credited towards this money judgment.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit to the Court for review and signature.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.

Proceedings concluded at 10:29 a.m.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-09-2022 Continued To Oct-26-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
